title: dependency_plan
description: Output contract for intermediate/dependency_plan.json (Step 2.5c). Consumed by Steps 2.5d, 3, 5, 6, 7. See mellea-fy-deps.md for the authoritative category default-disposition table, the eight valid dispositions, the four generation modes, and the Step 2.5d amendment protocol that updates element_mapping.json.

format_version.description: Format version of this dependency plan document (e.g. '1.0').

source_runtime.description: Source runtime carried over from classification.json (e.g. 'openclaw', 'crewai'). Used by Step 6 to format SETUP.md sections appropriately.

generation_mode.description: The generation mode in effect: auto = apply category defaults; ask = elicit overrides via terminal UI; config = read overrides from a JSON file; strict = halt if any stub/delegate disposition would be applied.

user_acknowledged_stubs.description: True when the user interacted with the elicitation UI (ask mode) or supplied a config file containing at least one stub disposition. Used by Step 6 to suppress the auto-mode recap warning.

plan.description: One entry per dependency. May be empty when the source has no C1-C9 categorised elements.

category.description: Snake-case category code (or 'cross_reference' for pure cross-reference artifacts that resolve to disposition == 'remove').

disposition.description: How this dependency is realised in the generated code. See mellea-fy-deps.md §Disposition effects on generated code for the file-by-file consequence of each value.

source_of_decision.description: Why this disposition was chosen: auto = category default; user = ask-mode override; config = config-file override; dialect = dialect doc override.

source_elements.description: Inventory element IDs that produced this dependency entry. >1 entry implies aggregation per Step 1b's cross-element pass and Step 2.5a's audit-time merge.

target.description: Target symbol in the generated package, formatted as '<file>:<symbol>' (e.g. 'tools.py:doi_lookup', 'constrained_slots.py:slack_post', 'config.py:PREFIX_TEXT'). Slashes are permitted in <file> for nested files like 'fixtures/mock_tools.py'.

subtype.description: Optional. Required for category == 'c6_tools' to distinguish C6 sub-defaults (http/graphql/mcp/sdk imply real_impl by default; abstract implies stub). Cross-reference invariant (not enforced by JSON Schema): subtype must be present iff category == 'c6_tools'.

prerequisites.description: Optional. Free-form prerequisite descriptions (e.g. 'HTTP access to api.crossref.org', 'Slack OAuth scopes channels:write'). Surfaced in SETUP.md.

override_rationale.description: Optional. Human-supplied rationale for an override (required when source_of_decision is 'user' or 'config' and disposition differs from the category default). Cross-reference invariant (not enforced by JSON Schema): MUST be present when source_of_decision in {'user', 'config'} and an override is applied.
